chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No. S- 171 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 25-09-2023 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Chadhar, Advocate for petitioner. ***** This case has been fixed for non-prosecution, but Mr. Shafi Muhammad Chandio, Additional A.G present in Court, has waived notice and undertakes that the petitioner would be dealt with in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and accordingly this petition is disposed of. JUDGE Ahmad
